description.value: **`<lyra-attachment-chip>`** (default: `0.8s`) — Duration of one indeterminate upload-spinner rotation. The ambient loop stops under reduced motion.
**`<lyra-button>`** (default: `0.9875`) — `transform: scale()` factor applied while a non-disabled button is pressed.
**`<lyra-button-group>`** — Gap between grouped controls.
**`<lyra-button>`** (default: `1.08`) — `filter: brightness()` multiplier applied while hovering a non-disabled button.
**`<lyra-button>`** (default: `1s`) — Rotation period of the `loading` spinner.

**`<lyra-button>`** (default: `100%`) — Inline size of the internal button. The host defaults it to `100%` so the native button follows the host's own width; override to `auto` (or any other value) for a compact inline composition.
**`<lyra-chat-message>`** (default: `80%`) — Maximum inline size of the message bubble.
**`<lyra-chip>`** (default: `var(--lyra-chip-bg)`) — Background while a toggleable chip is selected, independently themeable from its resting background.
**`<lyra-combobox>`** — Input text size.
**`<lyra-combobox>`** — Selected-tag text size.
**`<lyra-combobox>`** — Selected-tag padding.
**`<lyra-combobox>`** — Minimum input-container block size.
**`<lyra-combobox>`** — Padding inside the input container.
**`<lyra-contact-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.
**`<lyra-document-preview>`** (default: `var(--lyra-font-mono)`) — Font used for plain-text previews.
**`<lyra-document-preview>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum body block size before the preview scrolls internally.
**`<lyra-document-preview>`** (default: `0.8s`) — Duration of one indeterminate loading-indicator rotation.
**`<lyra-document-viewer>`** (default: `70vh`) — Maximum block size of the dialog body before it scrolls internally.
**`<lyra-docx-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of the scrollable document body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.
**`<lyra-drawer>`** — Block size for top/bottom drawers.
**`<lyra-drawer>`** — Inline size for start/end drawers.
**`<lyra-empty>`** — Cross-axis and text alignment used in compact mode; set to `center` for dense but centered empty states.
**`<lyra-empty>`** (default: `var(--lyra-space-xs)`) — Padding used in compact mode; accepts any padding shorthand (e.g. `8px 2px`).
**`<lyra-flag>`** (default: `4 / 3`) — Rectangular flag aspect ratio.
**`<lyra-flag>`** (default: `cover`) — How the image fits its flag frame.
**`<lyra-flag>`** — Rectangular flag corner radius.
**`<lyra-gauge>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — Fill stroke for radial, ring, and linear gauges.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-danger)`) — Border color for an annotated cell.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-focus-ring-color)`) — Focus ring around a focused cell.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** — Font for axis/legend labels drawn on the canvas.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-no-data)`) — Fill for cells with no value.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — High endpoint of the sequential color ramp.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand-quiet)`) — Low endpoint of the sequential color ramp.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-success)`) — Border color for the selected cell.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-surface)`) — Hover tooltip background.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-text)`) — Hover tooltip text color.
**`<lyra-graph>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-border)`) — Default link stroke, overridden per-link by a link's own `color`.
**`<lyra-lite-chart>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — Stroke for a bar/point whose category index is in `selectedIndex`.
**`<lyra-graph>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — Default node fill, overridden per-node by `GraphNode.color`.
**`<lyra-dropdown>`, `<lyra-popover>`** — Maximum inline size of the popup (default `--lyra-size-20rem`).
**`<lyra-pagination>`** — Control inline/block size; defaults from the `size` variant.
**`<lyra-pagination>`** — Control font size; defaults from the `size` variant.
**`<lyra-pdf-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lyra-size-24rem)`) — Block size of the virtualized page list.
**`<lyra-rating>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-border)`) — Unfilled-star color.
**`<lyra-rating>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-warning)`) — Filled-star color.
**`<lyra-rating>`** (default: `var(--lyra-font-size-xl)`) — Star size.
**`<lyra-scroller>`** — Control size.
**`<lyra-scroller>`** — Minimum vertical scroller size.
**`<lyra-sparkline>`** (default: `0.15`) — Fill opacity of the area under the line (type="area").
**`<lyra-sparkline>`** (default: `1.5`) — Stroke width of the line/area path.
**`<lyra-svg-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.
**`<lyra-textarea>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum auto-grown block size before the textarea scrolls.
**`<lyra-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `1s linear`) — Running-icon animation duration and timing.
**`<lyra-tool-result-dialog>`** — Insets for the maximized panel.
**`<lyra-tool-result-dialog>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-overlay)`) — Backdrop color.
**`<lyra-tool-result-dialog>`** (default: `1s linear`) — Running-status animation duration and timing.
**`<lyra-tooltip>`** — Tooltip background color (default `--lyra-color-neutral`).
**`<lyra-tooltip>`** — Tooltip text color (default `--lyra-color-on-neutral`).
**`<lyra-tooltip>`** — Maximum inline size of the tooltip (default `--lyra-size-20rem`).

**`<lyra-chat-message>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) — Streaming-indicator animation duration and timing function.

**`<lyra-skeleton>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) — Animation duration and timing function shared by the pulse and sheen effects.

**`<lyra-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) — Pending-icon pulse duration and timing.

**`<lyra-typing-indicator>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) — Animation duration and timing function shared by all variants.
**`<lyra-typing-indicator>`** (default: `600ms`) — Delay for the second dot in the dots variant.
**`<lyra-typing-indicator>`** (default: `1200ms`) — Delay for the third dot in the dots variant.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — First entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-success)`) — Second entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-warning)`) — Third entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-danger)`) — Fourth entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-chart-1)`) — Fifth entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-chart-2)`) — Sixth entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-chart-3)`) — Seventh entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-chart-4)`) — Eighth entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-zoomable-frame>`** — Minimum viewport block size.
